whyAuraStor.label: Our Promise
whyAuraStor.title: Why Aura Stor
whyAuraStor.subtitle: Every detail is considered — from the stone we source to the moment it arrives at your door.

natural.title: Natural Gemstones
natural.description: Every stone is 100% genuine — sourced ethically, never synthetic, never treated. You wear the real earth.

shipping.title: Fast Gulf Shipping
shipping.description: Quick, tracked delivery across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar. Your order arrives carefully packaged.

handcrafted.title: Handcrafted Jewelry
handcrafted.description: Each piece is crafted by hand with precision and care — no mass production, no shortcuts.

support.title: WhatsApp Support
support.description: Order, ask questions, or track your delivery — all via WhatsApp. Real people, genuine care.

howItWorks.label: Simple Process
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From browsing to unboxing — ordering your crystal jewelry is as easy as sending a message.

step1.title: Choose Your Stone
step1.description: Browse our curated collections of natural crystal jewelry. Each piece lists the stone's energy, chakra, and properties to help you find the right match.

step2.title: Place Your Order
step2.description: Message us on WhatsApp with the piece you want. We confirm availability, answer any questions, and arrange your order — no checkout forms, no accounts needed.

step3.title: Receive & Enjoy
step3.description: Your jewelry is packed with care and shipped to your door. Track your delivery via WhatsApp and receive your natural crystal piece exactly as pictured.

trust.label: Customer Love
trust.title: Why Customers Love Aura Stor
trust.subtitle: Thousands of happy customers across the Gulf trust us for their crystal jewelry.

item1.title: Premium Natural Stones
item1.description: Every gemstone is authentic and ethically sourced. We never use synthetics, dyes, or imitations — what you see is what you receive.

item2.title: Secure Ordering Process
item2.description: Order directly via WhatsApp with full transparency. You know exactly what you're getting, at what price, before any payment is made.

item3.title: Fast International Shipping
item3.description: We ship across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar with tracked delivery. Your order is packaged with care and arrives in perfect condition.

item4.title: Personalized Customer Support
item4.description: No bots, no ticket queues. Message us on WhatsApp and get a real response from a real person, seven days a week.

brandStory.label: Our Story
brandStory.title: Born from Earth.
brandStory.body1: Aura Stor began with a simple belief: the stones we wear carry more than beauty. Every crystal formed over millions of years underground carries an energy — a frequency — that quietly interacts with our own.
brandStory.body2: We curate and craft each piece from 100% natural gemstones, chosen for their quality and their energy. No synthetics. No shortcuts. Just the earth, shaped with intention.
brandStory.pullQuote: "The right stone finds the right person."
brandStory.pillar1: Every stone is 100% genuine — never synthetic, never treated, never imitation.
brandStory.pillar2: Each piece is designed to be worn as a daily reminder of your energy and intention.
brandStory.pillar3: Order directly via WhatsApp. Real people, real conversation, real care.

stoneOfMonth.label: Stone of the Month
stoneOfMonth.waMessage: Hello! I'm interested in {stone} jewelry from Aura Stor. Can you help me choose a piece?
stoneOfMonth.stonePullQuote: Wear it when the world asks you to be smaller than you are.
stoneOfMonth.stoneSummary: Tiger's Eye carries the energy of the earth and the warmth of the sun. Its golden-brown bands shift with a living light called chatoyancy — a visual reminder that strength and clarity are always within you. This month, we're celebrating the stone that moves people forward.

collections.title: Crystal Jewelry Collections
collections.subtitle: Each collection is a curated energy journey.
collections.label: Collections
collections.pageSubtitle: Each collection is built around a single stone, a single energy, and a single intention.
collections.pageIntro: We do not just sell jewelry. We tell stories. Every Aura Stor collection begins with a stone — its history, its energy, its meaning across cultures.
collections.waMessage: Hello! I'm interested in the {collection} collection at Aura Stor. Can you tell me more about the pieces?

crystalGuide.title: Crystal Guide — Gemstone Properties & Meanings
crystalGuide.label: Knowledge
crystalGuide.subtitle: Discover the energy, chakra, and healing properties of every stone in our collection.
crystalGuide.pageQuote: Every stone carries a story millions of years in the making. We believe that wearing it with intention transforms it from decoration into something far more personal.
crystalGuide.howToChoose1Body: The crystal that draws your eye is often the one you need. Before reading about properties, notice which stone you are naturally pulled toward.
crystalGuide.howToChoose2Body: What are you seeking right now — clarity, calm, courage, love? Every stone carries a specific energy. Read each guide to find the one that aligns with where you are in life.
crystalGuide.howToChoose3Body: A crystal worn with awareness carries more meaning than one worn by habit. Set an intention when you put it on. Let it become a small daily reminder.
crystalGuide.waMessage: Hello! I just read about {crystal} on your Crystal Guide and I'm interested in {crystal} jewelry. Can you help me?
crystalGuide.waMessageSlug: Hello! I just read about {crystal} on your website and I'm interested in {crystal} jewelry. Can you help me choose the right piece?

about.title: About Us
about.label: Our Story
about.subtitle: Born from earth. Worn with intention.
about.openingQuote: We started Aura Stor because we believed that the things you wear every day should mean something. Not just look beautiful — mean something.
about.storyP1: Aura Stor was founded in 2026 with a single conviction: that natural crystals are not mystical objects to be worshipped from a distance. They are companions — stones you carry, wear, and return to. Each one a small, quiet anchor to what you believe in.
about.storyP2: We saw a market full of beautiful jewelry and empty descriptions. No story. No meaning. No acknowledgment that these stones have traveled millions of years to reach your wrist. We wanted to change that.
about.storyP3: So we built Aura Stor differently. Every product page tells the full story of the stone — its energy, its history, its chakra alignment, how to care for it, and what it is best worn for. We built a Crystal Guide so that you can learn before you choose. And we made WhatsApp our primary sales channel, because we believe every customer deserves a personal conversation, not a shopping cart.
about.storyP4: We ship to Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar. We are small, and proud of it. Small means personal. Small means every order matters.
about.value1Body: Every stone in our collection is 100% natural — never synthetic, never dyed, never lab-created. We source directly from trusted suppliers who share our commitment to authenticity. You will never find imitations here.
about.value2Body: We believe jewelry should carry meaning. Each piece is chosen not only for its beauty but for the energy it holds. We tell you what that energy is, where it comes from, and how to work with it — so your jewelry becomes a daily practice, not just an accessory.
about.value3Body: We do not have a shopping cart. Every order is placed through WhatsApp — personally, conversationally, and with care. We want to know who you are buying for, what you are looking for, and how we can make the experience feel as special as the piece itself.
about.promise2: Honest descriptions of every stone's energy
about.promise3: Packaging that feels like a gift, not a delivery
about.promise4: A team that answers your messages personally
about.promise5: No pressure. No algorithms. Just crystals.
about.letsTalkBody: Have a question about our collection, a stone, or a special request? We are always on WhatsApp.
about.waMessage: Hello! I just read the Aura Stor story and I'd love to learn more about your collection.

contact.label: Reach Out
contact.subtitle: We are a WhatsApp-first brand. Every message is answered by a real person.
contact.primaryChannelBody: All orders, enquiries, and custom requests are handled personally via WhatsApp.

contact.topicGiftMsg: Hello! I'm looking for a gift from Aura Stor. Can you help me choose the right crystal piece?

customOrders.title: Custom Orders
customOrders.subtitle: Every piece we make is personal. A custom order is just even more so.
customOrders.intro: Our standard collection is thoughtfully curated, but we know that the perfect piece is sometimes one that does not exist yet.
customOrders.step1Body: Send us a WhatsApp message describing what you have in mind — which stone or energy you are drawn to, the type of piece (bracelet, ring, necklace, set), and who it is for.
customOrders.step2Body: Our team will share options, answer questions, and help you refine your vision. We can suggest stone combinations, discuss energies, and ensure the final piece aligns with your intention.
customOrders.step3Body: Once confirmed, your custom piece is handcrafted and packaged in our signature velvet gift pouch with a crystal meaning card. Delivery to Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar.
customOrders.whatWeCreateTitle: What We Can Create For You
customOrders.idea1: A specific stone combination not in our current collection
customOrders.idea2: A matching set for you and a loved one
customOrders.idea3: A gift set curated for a specific intention (calm, courage, love)
customOrders.idea4: A ring in a stone we have not yet listed
customOrders.idea5: A larger beaded bracelet for a different wrist size
customOrders.idea6: An anniversary, birthday, or Eid gift, thoughtfully chosen
customOrders.waMessage: Hello! I'm interested in a custom crystal piece from Aura Stor. I'd love to discuss what's possible.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.subtitle: Every order is packaged with care and shipped directly to you.
shipping.highlightFreeShippingNote: Flat fee applies for smaller orders
shipping.waMessage: Hello! I have a question about shipping and delivery for an Aura Stor order.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.subtitle: We want you to love your piece. If something is not right, we will make it right.
returns.step1Body: Send us a WhatsApp message within 14 days of receiving your order. Include your order details and the reason for your return.
returns.step2Body: Our team will review your request and confirm whether the item qualifies for a return based on our policy.
returns.step3Body: We will provide instructions for returning the item. Please ensure it is safely packaged to arrive in its original condition.
returns.step4Body: Once we receive and inspect the item, we will process your refund or exchange within 5–7 business days.
returns.waMessage: Hello! I have a question about returning or exchanging an Aura Stor order. Can you help?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At {siteName}, we are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal information with transparency and care.
privacy.section1Body: When you contact us via WhatsApp to place an order or make an enquiry, we collect the information you share with us directly — including your name, contact number, delivery address, and order details.
privacy.section2Body: We use the information you provide solely to process your order, coordinate delivery, and respond to your enquiries. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties.
privacy.section3Body: Our primary communication channel is WhatsApp. When you message us, your conversation is subject to WhatsApp's own privacy policy in addition to ours.
privacy.section4Body: Our website uses standard analytics to understand how visitors interact with our pages. This data is anonymous and aggregated. We do not use advertising tracking cookies or sell data to advertisers.
privacy.section5Body: We take the security of your personal information seriously. Your order details and contact information are kept confidential and are only accessible to the Aura Stor team.
privacy.section6Body: You have the right to request access to the personal information we hold about you, to ask us to correct inaccurate information, or to request deletion of your data.
privacy.section7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any significant changes will be noted on this page with an updated revision date.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions govern your use of the {siteName} website and the purchase of products from us.
terms.section1Body: By using the Aura Stor website or placing an order with us via WhatsApp, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.
terms.section2Body: All products sold by Aura Stor are made with 100% natural gemstones. Because each stone is unique, slight variations in colour, pattern, and size compared to product photographs are natural and expected.
terms.section3Body: All orders are placed and confirmed via WhatsApp. An order is confirmed only once you receive written confirmation from an Aura Stor team member.
terms.section4Body: Payment terms will be communicated by our team when your order is confirmed. Full payment is required before dispatch.
terms.section5Body: We ship to Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, and Turkey. Estimated delivery times are provided in good faith but are not guaranteed.
terms.section6Body: Returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery for items in their original, unworn condition with original packaging. Custom orders are final sale.
terms.section7Body: All content on the Aura Stor website is the property of Aura Stor and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.section8Body: Crystal energy descriptions and chakra information are provided for informational purposes only. They are not intended as medical advice.
terms.section9Body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Aura Stor is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our website or products.
terms.section10Body: We reserve the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of our website or services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

comingSoon.label: Coming Soon
comingSoon.bodyCopy: This collection is being thoughtfully curated. Each piece will be handcrafted with intention, sourced from natural gemstones, and packaged in our signature velvet gift pouches.
comingSoon.bodyCopy2: Some things are worth waiting for. In the meantime, our team is available via WhatsApp to discuss special requests or early access.
comingSoon.replyTime: We reply within a few hours
comingSoon.beFirstBody: Leave your email and we will notify you the moment this collection launches. No spam — just the launch announcement and nothing else.
comingSoon.onTheList: You are on the list. We will be in touch.
comingSoon.waMessage: Hello! I'm interested in {category} from Aura Stor. Can you let me know when they'll be available?

reviews.title: Share Your Aura Stor Experience
reviews.subtitle: Your story helps us grow. Real reviews from real customers.
reviews.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your experience — the quality, how it made you feel, or what you love about your piece…
reviews.disclaimer: Reviews are moderated and will appear on this page after approval.
reviews.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

reviews.emptyTitle: Be the first to share your Aura Stor experience.
reviews.emptyBody: We are a new brand built on quality and trust. Your honest words mean everything — and help others find the right piece for them.
